nasb.text: This was the inheritance of the tribe of the sons of Dan according to their families, these cities with their villages.

esv.text: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Dan, according to their clans—these cities with their villages.

cnv.text: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是但支派按著家族所得的產業。

ccb.text: 这些城邑和村庄都是但支派按宗族得到的产业。
